name: Message
description: Message groups a collection of contents in tabs.

props.name: closable
props.description: Whether the message can be closed manually using the close icon.

props.name: sticky
props.description: When enabled, message is not removed automatically.

props.name: life
props.description: Delay in milliseconds to close the message automatically.

props.name: icon
props.description: Display a custom icon for the message.

props.name: closeIcon
props.description: Icon to display in the message close button.

props.name: closeButtonProps
props.description: Used to pass all properties of the HTMLButtonElement to the close button.

props.name: unstyled
props.description: When enabled, it removes component related styles in the core.

props.name: size
props.description: Defines the size of the component.

props.name: variant
props.description: Specifies the variant of the component.

events.name: close
events.description: Callback to invoke when a message is closed.

events.name: life-end
events.description: Callback to invoke when the message's timeout is over.

slots.name: icon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the item icon element. */ class: any; }): VNode[]

slots.name: closeicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the item icon element. */ class: any; }): VNode[]

slots.name: container
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Close message function. */ closeCallback: () => void; }): VNode[]
